notes: Your engineer now has a race plan BEFORE the lights go out: on the grid he announces his strategy - laps, stops, first box lap and fuel - built from your own car stats, in all 29 languages. Set pit fuel by voice: say 'add 50 litres' and it goes straight into ACC (MFD) and iRacing (official API), or say 'apply the plan' and he loads his computed strategy. THE BIG ONE: no more language mixing - every callout, coaching line, roast and banter is now translated offline into all 29 languages, no API key needed. Full flag coverage in every sim: black, white, green, red, meatball and safety car. Huge LMU / rFactor 2 cleanup: tyre temps that match the in-game HUD, working flags and penalties, multiclass traffic intelligence (he tells you who to let by - by class name), no more false yellows in the garage. New: engineer volume slider, separate spotter on/off, smooth delta bar, corner coach in your language with more tips in practice, quali traffic help. Opt-in community telemetry: share anonymous lap data, get reference laps and fuel estimates for your car from lap one - off by default, clearly explained. Plus a pile of fixes: no reopening after you close the app, no double windows, no overheat spam in the pits, better mic diagnostics, and the Slovak voice actually speaks Slovak. Thanks for every report on Discord - keep them coming!
